questions.question: Which physician was sent by Bimbisara to treat Avanti King Pradyota?
questions.explanation: The royal physician, Jivaka, was sent by Bimbisara to treat Avanti King Pradyota, who was ailing with Jaundice.

questions.question: What was the other name of Bimbisara?
questions.explanation: As per the Jain literature, Bimbisara (who was the real founder of Haryanka dynasty) was also known as Shrenika.

questions.question: Who was the last ruler of Shisunaga dynasty?
questions.explanation: The last ruler of Haryanka dynasty, Nagadasaka was over thrown by his amatya (or governor) Shisunaga and he established Shisunaga dynasty in 412 BC. Nandivardhan (367 BC–345 BC) was the last ruler of this Shisunaga dynasty.

questions.question: Which among the following rulers is often described as ‘the first empire builder of Indian History’?
questions.explanation: The founder of Nanda dynasty, Mahapadmananda is often described as ‘the first empire builder of Indian History’.

questions.question: Who was the founder of Nanda dynasty?
questions.explanation: Mahapadmananda (345 BC – 329 BC) was the founder of Nanda dynasty. Mahapadmananda was also known as Ekarat and Sarvakshatrantaka.
